applicability_notes: Elementwise unary; returns boolean-like tensor (sign bit of each element). Supports bfloat16, bfloat8_b, int32 (including INT32_MIN/MAX and signed-zero edge cases). Golden: torch.signbit. Output of ttnn may need .to(torch.bool) cast for exact comparison with torch golden.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small test shapes (e.g. rand bfloat16 tiles, range [-100,100])
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_input, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory config
unit test: ttnn.signbit(tt_input, memory_config=dst_mem_config) — destination memory config is parameterized; no size-conditional placement observed
